name: part_013
file: tmp_【#白銀ノエル生誕祭2025】生誕 3D LIVE 睡夢 - suimu -【白銀ノエル⧸ホロライブ】 [eV59GTk0J3s]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_013.webm

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs "VAVAVA! Virtual Oita" on stage. Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Usada Pekora join her partway through.
Noel and the guest members wave goodbye from a bath-style set as the stream concludes.
Ending illustration featuring a handwritten message from Noel to her fans.
